turns.en: Pumping yourself or full service?
I'll pump myself. Regular, please.
Please swipe your card or pay inside first.
Will it stop automatically when it's full?
Yes, but don't top it off too much.
Where's the restroom?
Behind the store. Ask for the key at the counter.

title: Parking Ticket
scene: 你发现车窗上贴了停车罚单。

turns.en: What's wrong? You look upset.

turns.cn: 收到一张停车罚单，七十五块。
turns.en: I got a parking ticket. Seventy-five dollars.
Were you parked in the wrong spot?

turns.cn: 咪表过期了，就差五分钟。
turns.en: The meter expired. I was only five minutes late.
You could try disputing it online.

turns.cn: 十五天内交还能减免吗？
turns.en: Is there a discount if I pay within fifteen days?

turns.cn: 早点交通常能少罚一点。
turns.en: Paying early usually reduces the fine a bit.

turns.cn: 常规保养还是只换机油？
turns.en: Full service or just an oil change?

turns.cn: 换机油和滤芯，检查一下轮胎。
turns.en: Oil and filter change. Please check the tires too.

turns.cn: 大概三十分钟，请在休息室等。
turns.en: About thirty minutes. Please wait in the lounge.

turns.cn: 上次是一万英里前换的。
turns.en: Last change was ten thousand miles ago.

turns.cn: 机油颜色偏黑，该换了。前胎磨损均匀。
turns.en: The oil is pretty dark. Time for a change. Front tires look even.
How much will it be total?
Forty-nine ninety, labor included.

title: Asking for a Ride
scene: 你的车坏了，请同事搭车回家。

turns.cn: 不好意思，今天能搭你的车吗？我车抛锚了。
turns.en: Sorry to ask, but could I get a ride today? My car broke down.
Sure. Where do you live?
One twenty-three Maple Street. Is it on your way?
Yeah, I'm off at six.
Great. I'll chip in for gas.
Don't worry about it.
I'll buy you dinner sometime. Thanks!
Hello. Do you have a reservation?
Yes, Zhang Wei. Three days.
Driver's license and credit card, please.
Do I need to buy extra insurance?

turns.cn: 您的信用卡若含租车险可以不买的。
turns.en: If your credit card covers rentals, you can skip it.

turns.cn: 加满油再还是预付油费？
turns.en: Return full or prepay for gas?
Returning full is usually cheaper.

title: Roadside Assistance
scene: 你车在高速上爆胎，打道路救援电话。

turns.cn: 道路救援，请说车牌和位置。
turns.en: Roadside assistance. License plate and location, please.

turns.cn: ABC1234，在95号公路南向，刚过42出口。
turns.en: ABC1234, southbound on I-95, just past exit forty-two.

turns.cn: 会员姓名？爆胎还是抛锚？
turns.en: Member name? Flat tire or breakdown?
Zhang Wei. Right rear flat tire.

turns.cn: 拖车约四十分钟到，请靠边双闪。
turns.en: A truck should arrive in about forty minutes. Pull over with hazards on.
Is it safe to wait inside the car?

turns.cn: 离车道远的话可以，注意来车。
turns.en: If you're well off the lane, yes. Watch for traffic.
